P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
⊢ IdentDistrib (fun ω => e₁ ∈ (G ω).edgeSet) (fun ω => e₂ ∈ (G ω).edgeSet) P P

by
  rw [IdentDistrib, ← map_map measurable_mem hG.measurable,
    ← map_map measurable_mem hG.measurable, hG.map_eq]
  congr 1; ext s hs
  simp only [map_apply measurable_mem hs, binomialRandom_apply]
  let π (e : Sym2 V) := toNNReal p • Measure.dirac (¬e.IsDiag) + toNNReal (σ p) • Measure.dirac False
  change (infinitePi π) ((fun G e ↦ e ∈ G.edgeSet) '' {G | e₁ ∈ G.edgeSet ∈ s}) =
    (infinitePi π) ((fun G e ↦ e ∈ G.edgeSet) '' {G | e₂ ∈ G.edgeSet ∈ s})
  have h_im (e) : (fun G e' ↦ e' ∈ G.edgeSet) '' {G | e ∈ G.edgeSet ∈ s} =
      {E | (e ∈ E) ∈ s} ∩ range edgeSet := by
    ext E; simp; aesop
  rw [h_im e₁, h_im e₂]
  -- The measure is supported on `range edgeSet` (loopless graphs), so we can ignore the intersection.
  have h_supp : infinitePi π (range edgeSet)ᶜ = 0 := by
    rw [← Set.compl_subset_iff_union, Set.range_edgeSet, Set.subset_def]
    intro E hE; rw [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_forall] at hE
    obtain ⟨e, he, heE⟩ := hE
    refine Measure.infinitePi_apply_eq_zero_of_mem _ (Set.finite_singleton e) ?_
    intro f hf; simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hf; subst hf
    simp only [π, he, not_true_eq_false, Measure.dirac_false, smul_zero, add_zero,
      Measure.dirac_apply', Set.mem_setOf_eq, if_false]
  rw [Measure.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right (Set.subset_compl_iff_disjoint_left.1 h_supp),
    Measure.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right (Set.subset_compl_iff_disjoint_left.1 h_supp)]
  -- Now it's the measure of a cylinder set on coordinates with identical distribution.
  refine Measure.infinitePi_apply_eq_of_mem_congr (Set.finite_singleton _) (Set.finite_singleton _) ?_
  · simp [π, he₁, he₂]
  · intro f _
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    congr! 1; obtain rfl := one_eq_one; simp [eq_comm]
